methodology: Ground Truth — Read before write. Source everything.

briefingCorrections.RC-1: Briefing claimed no WS handler exists. CORRECTED: voxel-stream.ts (770 lines) already implemented with Redis Pub/Sub. Issue is likely build/deploy, not missing source.
briefingCorrections.RC-3: Briefing claimed smoke test race condition. CORRECTED: deploy workflow already has 7-min polling with 3-consecutive-healthy requirement + BUILD_SHA verification.
briefingCorrections.RC-4: Briefing claimed dead nginx blocks. CORRECTED: All blocks route to legitimate services. Zero dead blocks found.

RC-2.description: Consolidated migration for all Sprint 5 ROS MRO schema drift

RC-1.status: INVESTIGATED — No source code fix needed
RC-1.description: WebSocket handler exists in source. Build system (Webpack via Nx) bundles main.ts → main.js including all imports. Import chain verified: main.ts → websocket/voxel-stream.ts. A redeploy should resolve the dist issue.

RC-3.status: ASSESSED — Already resolved in current workflow
RC-3.description: validate-deployment job requires 3 consecutive healthy polls (30s) + BUILD_SHA verification before smoke-tests run. The 0.2s race condition described in briefing does not match current implementation.

RC-4.description: All 18 nginx location blocks in main server block route to legitimate services. No dead blocks found. Route ↔ nginx 1:1 correspondence confirmed.

fortuneFiveHundredItems: WS rate limiting: nginx ws_connect zone (10r/m per IP, burst 5)
WS origin validation: allowlist check on connection (OWASP WebSocket Security)
WS per-IP connection limit: max 5 concurrent (prevents reconnect storms)
WS health metrics: voxelStream stats in /health and /api/health responses
testsAdded: voxel-stream.spec.ts — 10 tests: lifecycle, messaging, subscriptions, broadcast, stats
schema-drift.spec.ts — Static analysis: every table and enum in schema.prisma verified against migration SQL

nginxChanges.details: /ws/ block: added rate limiting (limit_req zone=ws_connect burst=5 nodelay)

commits: fix(schema): add missing Sprint 5 ROS MRO migration (RC-2)
feat(infra): Fortune 500 security and observability hardening
test(infra): schema drift detection + voxel-stream handler tests
openItems: RC-1 build verification: Trigger a redeploy to confirm voxel-stream handler appears in dist/main.js
AuditLog column drift: routes query action/details/entity_id but migration has event_type/resource_id/actor_id — causes fallback to mock data
